task_description: Implement the remaining product design bible backlog: Enhanced Music Player (shuffle/repeat/sleep timer/media session/gestures/keyboard shortcuts/continue listening), Discovery Page enhancements (browse by mood/decade/country/activity, hidden gems, trending), Search improvements (suggestions, instant results, advanced filters), Settings page (appearance/playback/privacy/storage/about with system theme support), UI/UX Polish (accessibility, performance, skeletons, context menus, empty states, error boundaries), and final consistency pass (theme, spacing, shadows, hydration fixes).
